name: White Cake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream the shortening.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold into batter.
7. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans, and let cool completely on wire racks.
10. Frost as desired.
Yield: one 2-layer cake
WHITE CUPCAKES:
1. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin pans, filling each cup two-thirds full.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
3. Remove from pans, and let cool on wire racks.
4. Frost as desired.
Yield: 26 cupcakes
